testcase.name: test_production_signals_not_affected_by_bve
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration_38_bug_fixes.py:153: in test_production_signals_not_affected_by_bve prod_signals = prod_data.get("signals", []) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'list' object has no attribute 'get'

testcase.name: test_admin_signals_endpoint
